message:
fix: add decision_evidence_status to dual-policy probe contract; remove incorrect scan size_hint assertions

Dual-policy probe contract (scripts/run_raptorq_e2e.sh,
tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs):

  The GF256 profile selection probe emits a decision_evidence_status
  field that was not validated by the contract checker. Add it to:
  - The jq schema validator (validate_dual_policy_probe_contract)
  - The override-mode branch assertion (must equal
    "runtime-override-unbacked" for manual env overrides)
  - The non-override branch assertion (must NOT equal that sentinel)
  - The Rust surface-token test (track_e_dual_policy_probe_contract_
    surface_tokens) for parity with the shell contract

  Without this, a probe implementation could silently drop the evidence
  status field and still pass contract validation.

Stream scan (src/stream/scan.rs):

  Remove two size_hint assertions from
  scan_accepts_pinned_non_unpin_streams that assumed the scan adapter
  reports exact remaining counts. After the Unpin constraint was relaxed
  in a prior commit, the underlying stream's size_hint may not propagate
  through Pin<&Scan<...>> the same way. The core behavior (correct poll
  results, terminal None) is still asserted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -352,6 +352,7 @@ validate_dual_policy_probe_contract() {
             (.command_bundle | type == "string" and test("^((rch exec -- )?(env .+ )?cargo bench --bench raptorq_benchmark -- gf256_primitives)")) and
             (.decision_artifact_id | type == "string" and length > 0) and
             (.decision_role | type == "string" and length > 0) and
+            (.decision_evidence_status | type == "string" and length > 0) and
             (.selected_candidate_summary | type == "string" and length > 0) and
             (.rejected_candidate_set_summary | type == "string" and length > 0) and
             (.selected_mul_delta_vs_baseline_pct | type == "string" and length > 0) and
@@ -395,6 +396,7 @@ validate_dual_policy_probe_contract() {
                     .command_bundle == "rch exec -- env <captured ASUPERSYNC_GF256_* override fields> cargo bench --bench raptorq_benchmark -- gf256_primitives" and
                     .decision_artifact_id == "manual_env_override_unbacked" and
                     .decision_role == "runtime_override_not_canonical_profile_selection" and
+                    .decision_evidence_status == "runtime-override-unbacked" and
                     .replay_pointer == "replay:rq-e-gf256-profile-pack-env-override-v1" and
                     (
                         .mode != "Auto" or
@@ -412,6 +414,7 @@ validate_dual_policy_probe_contract() {
                     .command_bundle == "rch exec -- cargo bench --bench raptorq_benchmark -- gf256_primitives" and
                     .decision_artifact_id != "manual_env_override_unbacked" and
                     .decision_role != "runtime_override_not_canonical_profile_selection" and
+                    .decision_evidence_status != "runtime-override-unbacked" and
                     .replay_pointer != "replay:rq-e-gf256-profile-pack-env-override-v1"
              end) and
             (if .addmul_decision == "Fused"

@@ -5192,6 +5192,7 @@ fn track_e_dual_policy_probe_contract_surface_tokens() {
         ".replay_pointer | type == \"string\" and length > 0",
         ".decision_artifact_id",
         ".decision_role",
+        ".decision_evidence_status | type == \"string\" and length > 0",
         ".selected_candidate_summary",
         ".rejected_candidate_set_summary",
         ".selected_mul_delta_vs_baseline_pct",
@@ -5203,6 +5204,7 @@ fn track_e_dual_policy_probe_contract_surface_tokens() {
         ".command_bundle == \"rch exec -- env <captured ASUPERSYNC_GF256_* override fields> cargo bench --bench raptorq_benchmark -- gf256_primitives\"",
         ".decision_artifact_id == \"manual_env_override_unbacked\"",
         ".decision_role == \"runtime_override_not_canonical_profile_selection\"",
+        ".decision_evidence_status == \"runtime-override-unbacked\"",
         ".replay_pointer == \"replay:rq-e-gf256-profile-pack-env-override-v1\"",
         ".mode != \"Auto\"",
         ".selected_tuning_fusion_shape == \"unknown\"",
